sourceTitle: NTU Policy on the Use of Generative Artificial Intelligence in Research
evidenceSnippetOriginal: Not citing or acknowledging the use of GenAI could be considered plagiarism (i.e. a form of research misconduct), especially if GenAI was used to generate ideas or for literature reviews.
